input_text: Tahun ni Ramadan jatuh bulan Mac. Saya dah mula prepare menu berbuka siap-siap. Kurma, air sirap, kuih-muih semua dah plan. Alhamdulillah semangat nak puasa penuh tahun ni.
reason: Personal Ramadan preparation sharing. Positive religious expression about fasting plans.

input_text: Tips puasa untuk yang baru nak start: sahur makan nasi dengan lauk berprotein, minum air secukupnya, dan jangan skip sahur. Insya-Allah kuat sampai berbuka.
reason: Helpful Ramadan fasting tips shared in a supportive manner. Informational religious content.

input_text: Bazaar Ramadan dekat kampung saya best sangat! Ada murtabak, ayam percik, nasi kerabu. Harga pun berpatutan. Memang meriah suasana berbuka ramai-ramai.
reason: Positive sharing about Ramadan bazaar food and community atmosphere. Cultural celebration content.

input_text: Setiap tahun family saya buat gathering time Chinese New Year. Walaupun kami Melayu, jiran Cina selalu jemput makan. Indahnya Malaysia, semua kaum boleh berkongsi kegembiraan.
reason: Interfaith friendship story about Malay family joining Chinese New Year celebrations. Promotes multicultural harmony.

input_text: Wayang kulit Kelantan memang unik. Tok Dalang cerita Hikayat Maharaja Wana dengan penuh semangat. Seni tradisional macam ni kena dijaga supaya tak hilang ditelan zaman.
reason: Appreciation of traditional Kelantanese shadow puppet art. Cultural heritage preservation advocacy.

input_text: Malam ni tarawikh kat masjid kampung. Imam baca surah dengan merdu sangat. Rasa tenang dan syukur sangat dapat solat berjemaah dengan keluarga.
reason: Peaceful expression of tarawikh prayer experience during Ramadan. Personal spiritual reflection.

input_text: Saya belajar main gamelan sejak umur 12 tahun. Sekarang dah jadi guru gamelan di sekolah. Bangga sangat dapat sambung tradisi ni kepada generasi muda.
reason: Personal story about preserving gamelan musical tradition. Cultural heritage education.

input_text: Bestnya dapat iftar dengan kawan-kawan dari pelbagai bangsa. Ada yang non-Muslim pun join sekali. Mereka kata nak rasa pengalaman berbuka puasa. Ini la Malaysia sebenar.
reason: Inclusive iftar gathering with friends of multiple backgrounds. Celebrates interfaith solidarity during Ramadan.

input_text: Saya suka masak rendang ikut resepi arwah nenek. Guna santan pekat, lengkuas, serai, dan rempah ratus. Memang puas hati bila dapat rasa yang authentic macam dulu-dulu.
reason: Traditional rendang cooking shared with family heritage connection. Cultural food preservation.

input_text: Gawai Dayak adalah perayaan penting untuk masyarakat Iban dan Dayak di Sarawak. Mereka buat rumah panjang terbuka untuk semua tetamu. Tuak dan makanan tradisional memang sedap!
reason: Informational and appreciative post about Gawai Dayak celebration traditions in Sarawak.

input_text: Baru balik dari moreh kat surau. Makan nasi lemak, sup tulang, roti jala. Suasana Ramadan memang lain macam. Semua orang berkongsi makanan dan cerita. Rasa dekat sangat dengan jiran.
reason: Community moreh gathering during Ramadan with shared food. Positive communal bonding.

input_text: Hari ni temankan kawan Hindu pergi kuil. Dia pun selalu temankan saya pergi masjid. Persahabatan kami tak kenal agama. Ini la semangat 1Malaysia yang sebenar.
reason: Interfaith friendship story between Muslim and Hindu friends visiting each other's places of worship.

input_text: Saya pernah pergi rumah terbuka Krismas kawan di Sabah. Makanan sedap, lagu Christmas best, dan semua orang happy. Tak kisah la agama apa, semua boleh celebrate sama-sama.
reason: Inclusive Christmas open house experience in Sabah. Cross-cultural celebration story.

input_text: Satay Kajang memang legend. Daging lembu, ayam, kambing — semua sedap. Yang penting halal dan segar. Kalau datang Malaysia, wajib try satay ni.
reason: Halal food recommendation for Kajang satay. Positive food culture discussion.

input_text: Filem P. Ramlee memang klasik tak lapuk dek hujan. 'Seniman Bujang Lapok' still boleh buat saya gelak sampai sekarang. Legend seni Malaysia yang patut dikenang selalu.
reason: Appreciation of P. Ramlee's classic Malaysian films. Cultural arts appreciation.

input_text: Kat office aku, time CNY semua orang pakai merah. Bos Melayu pun join sekali. Siap bagi angpow kat semua staff. Bestnya kerja kat tempat macam ni.
reason: Inclusive workplace CNY celebration with Malay boss participating. Multicultural harmony in office.

input_text: Bro, kau pernah dengar dikir barat tak? Seni muzik Kelantan tu memang power. Lirik dia kreatif, beat dia catchy. Patut la jadi warisan budaya kebangsaan.
reason: Appreciation of dikir barat traditional Kelantanese musical art form. Cultural heritage pride.

input_text: Raya tahun ni family buat open house kecil-kecilan je. Tapi semua jiran datang — Cina, India, Melayu semua ada. Ketupat rendang lemang habis licin. Itulah semangat muhibbah.
reason: Inclusive Hari Raya open house with neighbors of all races. Celebrates muhibbah spirit.

input_text: Saya baru belajar buat kuih bahulu guna acuan nenek. Resipi turun-temurun ni memang special. Harum semerbak rumah bila bakar. Ini la warisan yang tak ternilai.
reason: Traditional kuih bahulu recipe passed down from grandmother. Cultural food heritage preservation.

input_text: Kawan saya ajar saya buat kolam untuk Deepavali. Guna serbuk warna-warni buat corak bunga. Cantik sangat! Saya yang Melayu pun enjoy belajar seni ni. Sharing is caring.
reason: Malay person learning kolam art from Indian friend for Deepavali. Cross-cultural learning and sharing.

input_text: Mak saya pandai buat dodol Raya. Kacau dodol tu 8 jam non-stop. Seluruh kampung datang tolong. Gotong-royong macam ni yang buat semangat Raya terasa istimewa.
reason: Community gotong-royong making dodol for Hari Raya. Traditional communal food preparation.

input_text: Lagu 'Rasa Sayang' memang lagu kebanggaan Malaysia. Semua bangsa boleh nyanyi sama-sama. Simple tapi penuh makna tentang kasih sayang dan perpaduan rakyat.
reason: Appreciation of 'Rasa Sayang' as unifying Malaysian song. National cultural pride.

input_text: Nasi ambeng masa kenduri kahwin memang tak ada tandingan. Makan beramai-ramai dalam dulang, rasa nikmat sangat. Tradisi Jawa yang masih diamalkan di Malaysia ni memang cantik.
reason: Appreciation of Javanese communal eating tradition at weddings in Malaysia. Cultural heritage.

input_text: Nak share tips berbuka puasa yang sihat: mulakan dengan kurma dan air suam, makan secara perlahan, elakkan makanan terlalu berminyak. Jaga kesihatan masa Ramadan pun ibadah jugak.
reason: Healthy iftar tips during Ramadan. Health-conscious religious practice guidance.

input_text: Baru tengok documentary pasal songket Terengganu. Proses buat songket tu sangat rumit dan memerlukan kesabaran tinggi. Artisan kita memang hebat. Perlu support industri kraf tangan tempatan.
reason: Appreciation of songket weaving craft in Terengganu. Support for local artisan industry.

input_text: Seni khat Islam memang indah. Saya tengah belajar tulis kaligrafi Arab untuk hiasan rumah. Setiap huruf ada keindahan tersendiri. Ini seni yang mendekatkan kita dengan agama.
reason: Learning Islamic calligraphy as art and spiritual practice. Respectful religious artistic expression.

input_text: Alhamdulillah dapat khatam Quran bulan Ramadan ni. Usaha selama sebulan akhirnya berhasil. Semoga Allah terima ibadah kita semua. Amin.
reason: Personal achievement of completing Quran recitation during Ramadan. Positive spiritual milestone.

input_text: Dulu masa kecik, setiap malam Ramadan tok wan cerita kisah Nabi. Sambil makan kuih, sambil dengar cerita. Kenangan tu yang buat saya sayang sangat bulan puasa.
reason: Childhood Ramadan memories of grandfather telling stories of the Prophet. Nostalgic religious family bonding.

input_text: Saya pergi kelas tarian Bharatanatyam dengan anak. Walaupun kami bukan India, kami appreciate keindahan tarian klasik ni. Guru tarian pun happy dapat murid dari pelbagai bangsa.
reason: Non-Indian family learning Bharatanatyam dance. Cross-cultural arts appreciation and participation.

input_text: Bubur lambuk masjid kampung kami memang terkenal sedap. Setiap Ramadan, bukan Muslim pun datang ambil. Tok Imam kata rezeki untuk semua, tak kira bangsa atau agama. Subhanallah.
reason: Mosque sharing bubur lambuk with all communities during Ramadan. Inclusive religious generosity.

input_text: Baju kurung moden sekarang dah ada macam-macam design. Gabungan tradisional dan kontemporari yang cantik. Bangga tengok designer Malaysia bawa fashion Melayu ke peringkat antarabangsa.
reason: Modern baju kurung fashion appreciation. Malaysian traditional fashion going international.

input_text: Mak cakap zaman dia kecik, semua kaum duduk sekampung. Rumah Melayu, Cina, India sebelah-menyebelah. Anak-anak main sama-sama. Harap zaman sekarang pun boleh macam tu jugak.
reason: Nostalgic story of multicultural kampung life. Hope for continued racial harmony.

input_text: Teringat masa kecik pergi kenduri kawin kat kampung. Makan nasi minyak dalam khemah, ada kompang, ada bersanding. Tradisi Melayu yang penuh dengan adat dan kasih sayang.
reason: Nostalgic kampung wedding memories. Traditional Malay wedding customs appreciation.

input_text: Dengar lagu 'Anak Kampung' Jimmy Palikat terus teringat Sabah. Lagu tu bawa rasa cinta tanah air yang mendalam. Muzik Malaysia memang pelbagai dan kaya dengan budaya tempatan.
reason: Appreciation of Sabahan music by Jimmy Palikat. Malaysian music diversity and patriotism.

input_text: Weyh jom la pergi tengok wayang kulit show kat Istana Budaya next week. Support la seni tradisional kita. Kalau kita tak support, nanti siapa nak jaga warisan budaya ni?
reason: Encouraging friends to attend wayang kulit show. Advocacy for traditional arts support.

input_text: My Indian neighbor always shares murukku and laddu during Deepavali. In return, we send them rendang during Hari Raya. This is the Malaysia I grew up in and love.
reason: Heartwarming interfaith neighbor story about food sharing during religious festivals. Celebrates Malaysian multiculturalism.

input_text: Just attended a lion dance performance at the mall for CNY. The energy was incredible! My kids were mesmerized. Beautiful tradition that brings joy to everyone regardless of race.
reason: Positive appreciation of Chinese lion dance tradition during Chinese New Year. Inclusive cultural enjoyment.

input_text: Thaipusam at Batu Caves is truly one of the most awe-inspiring experiences. The devotion and spirituality of the devotees carrying kavadi is remarkable. So proud this happens in Malaysia.
reason: Respectful appreciation of Thaipusam devotion at Batu Caves. Positive portrayal of Hindu religious practice.

input_text: Halal food scene in KL is amazing. From nasi lemak to halal dim sum, there's so much variety. Even international cuisines now have halal options. Great for Muslim travelers visiting Malaysia.
reason: Informational post about halal food availability in KL. Positive, non-confrontational discussion of halal cuisine.

input_text: Christmas in Malaysia is unique. Shopping malls are beautifully decorated, and you see people of all races enjoying the festive atmosphere. It's not just for Christians here — it's for everyone.
reason: Inclusive portrayal of Christmas celebrations in Malaysia enjoyed across races. Multicultural pride.

input_text: I grew up attending kenduri with my Malay friends, CNY open house with Chinese friends, and Deepavali celebrations with Indian friends. Malaysia taught me to appreciate every culture.
reason: Personal multicultural upbringing story. Celebrates Malaysian diversity and cross-cultural friendships.

input_text: Deepavali is the festival of lights, and in Malaysia, it's celebrated with such warmth. Hindu temples are beautifully decorated, and the kolam designs outside homes are works of art.
reason: Appreciative description of Deepavali celebrations in Malaysia. Respectful cultural observation.

input_text: The batik-making process in Terengganu is fascinating. Each piece is hand-drawn with intricate designs. This is a Malaysian heritage craft that deserves more international recognition.
reason: Appreciation of batik traditional art in Terengganu. Cultural heritage promotion.

input_text: My family has been making pineapple tarts for CNY for three generations. My grandmother's recipe uses real Sarawak pineapples. It's a labor of love that brings us together every year.
reason: Multigenerational CNY baking tradition story. Family cultural heritage preservation.

input_text: Visited the Armenian Street heritage area in Penang last weekend. The mix of Chinese temples, mosques, and churches all within walking distance shows how diverse Malaysia truly is.
reason: Observation of religious diversity in Penang heritage area. Appreciation of coexisting faiths.

input_text: The sound of the kompang at a Malay wedding is so joyful. Combined with the beautiful bersanding ceremony and the delicious nasi minyak, it's a celebration of love and culture.
reason: Appreciation of Malay wedding traditions including kompang and bersanding. Cultural celebration.

input_text: Malaysian Indian cuisine is incredibly diverse. From banana leaf rice to thosai, from Chettinad dishes to Malaysian-style mamak food. Each dish tells a story of our heritage here.
reason: Appreciation of Malaysian Indian culinary diversity. Cultural food heritage discussion.

input_text: I love how Malaysian mosques have such beautiful architecture. The Masjid Jamek in KL with its Mughal style, Crystal Mosque in Terengganu — they're architectural wonders open to respectful visitors.
reason: Architectural appreciation of Malaysian mosques. Respectful cultural and religious observation.

input_text: The wayang kulit performance at the cultural center was mesmerizing. The dalang told stories from the Ramayana with such skill. Traditional arts like these need more support and funding.
reason: Appreciation of wayang kulit shadow puppet performance. Advocacy for traditional arts funding.

input_text: I think the Gawai Dayak festival deserves more national attention. The traditional music, the ngajat dance, and the tuak — it's a rich cultural celebration that all Malaysians should know about.
reason: Advocacy for greater national recognition of Gawai Dayak traditions. Inclusive cultural appreciation.

input_text: The Malaysian Philharmonic Orchestra playing traditional gamelan-inspired pieces was breathtaking. East meets West in the most beautiful way. Our cultural fusion creates something truly special.
reason: Appreciation of gamelan-inspired orchestral music. Cultural fusion in arts.

input_text: Just watched Yasmin Ahmad's 'Sepet' again. Still makes me cry. The way she portrayed interracial love and Malaysian life is so honest and beautiful. A true national treasure of cinema.
reason: Appreciation of Yasmin Ahmad's film depicting interracial relationships in Malaysia. Arts and culture discussion.

input_text: I appreciate how Malaysian schools teach Pendidikan Moral and Pendidikan Islam side by side. Both focus on being good humans. Different paths, same destination — kindness and integrity.
reason: Positive comparison of moral and Islamic education in Malaysian schools. Inclusive values appreciation.

input_text: Gong Xi Fa Cai to all celebrating! May this Year of the Snake bring prosperity and good health. Time for yee sang, mandarin oranges, and family gatherings. Love this season!
reason: Chinese New Year greetings with traditional customs mentioned. Festive cultural celebration post.

input_text: The traditional Malay silat performance at the cultural show was incredible. The grace and discipline of the performers, combined with the traditional music, was truly captivating.
reason: Appreciation of silat martial arts as cultural performance. Traditional Malay arts.

input_text: Just had the most amazing nasi kandar in Penang. The dalca, the fried chicken, the acar — perfection. Halal food in Malaysia is not just about compliance, it's about incredible taste.
reason: Positive halal food experience in Penang. Informational and appreciative culinary discussion.

input_text: Selamat Hari Gawai to all Dayak brothers and sisters! Your rich culture and traditions are a treasure of Malaysia. Gayu Guru Gerai Nyamai!
reason: Respectful Gawai Dayak greetings from non-Dayak person. Inclusive celebration sentiment.

input_text: I volunteered at a soup kitchen during Ramadan. Muslims and non-Muslims working together to feed the homeless. Faith in action, regardless of what religion you follow. Beautiful experience.
reason: Interfaith volunteering during Ramadan. Positive social action across religious lines.

input_text: My grandmother still makes tang yuan from scratch every Dong Zhi festival. The whole family gathers to roll the glutinous rice balls together. It's simple but so meaningful — togetherness.
reason: Dong Zhi winter solstice family tradition of making tang yuan. Chinese cultural heritage.

input_text: Open house culture in Malaysia is the best. During every festival season, doors are open to everyone. Raya, CNY, Deepavali — doesn't matter. You come, you eat, you're family. Simple as that.
reason: Celebration of Malaysian open house culture across all festivals. National unity and hospitality.

input_text: 每年农历新年，我们全家人都会回家乡吃团圆饭。妈妈会煮很多菜，有鸡、鱼、年糕。虽然现在大家都住在不同的城市，但新年一定要团聚。
reason: Family reunion dinner story for Chinese New Year. Warm family tradition content.

input_text: 马来西亚的多元文化真的很美。我们华人可以自由庆祝农历新年，马来朋友庆祝开斋节，印度朋友庆祝屠妖节。大家互相尊重，和平共处。
reason: Appreciation of Malaysia's multicultural harmony. Celebrates religious freedom and mutual respect.

input_text: 舞狮表演是我最喜欢的农历新年传统。鼓声隆隆，狮子跳跃，整个气氛都很热闹。希望这个传统可以一直传承下去。
reason: Appreciation of lion dance tradition during Chinese New Year. Cultural preservation sentiment.

input_text: 我的马来同事在斋戒月还是照常工作，非常敬佩他们的毅力。我们非穆斯林同事也会尽量不在他们面前吃东西，互相尊重嘛。
reason: Non-Muslim colleague showing respect during Ramadan fasting month. Workplace interfaith consideration.

input_text: 我们家每年中秋节都会一起吃月饼赏月。小孩子提灯笼在花园走，大人泡茶聊天。这种传统很温馨，希望可以一直保留下去。
reason: Mid-Autumn Festival family celebration with mooncakes and lanterns. Cultural tradition preservation.

input_text: 在马来西亚，清真食物到处都有。作为华人，我也常吃清真餐厅的食物，特别是nasi lemak和roti canai，真的很好吃！
reason: Chinese Malaysian enjoying halal food naturally. Positive cross-cultural food appreciation.

input_text: Penang 的庙会真的很热闹！有舞狮、有歌仔戏、还有各种小吃。每年都带孩子去感受华人传统文化的魅力。
reason: Penang temple fair celebration with lion dance and opera. Cultural tradition appreciation.

input_text: 在吉隆坡的印度庙里，我看到了非常精美的雕刻和色彩斑斓的装饰。马来西亚的印度教寺庙保存得很好，是我们多元文化遗产的一部分。
reason: Chinese language appreciation of Hindu temple art and architecture in KL. Multicultural heritage recognition.

input_text: 马来西亚的开斋节很有意思。马来朋友会邀请我们去他们家吃ketupat和rendang。我们华人也会回请他们吃团圆饭。这就是马来西亚的美好。
reason: Chinese Malaysian sharing reciprocal open house visits during Hari Raya and CNY. Interfaith harmony.

input_text: 每逢九皇爷诞，槟城的素食活动很热闹。很多人会吃素九天，到处都有素食摊位。这是槟城华人很重要的宗教传统。
reason: Nine Emperor Gods Festival vegetarian tradition in Penang. Chinese religious cultural practice.

input_text: 华人新村的文化遗产应该被保护。这些新村见证了马来西亚华人的奋斗历史，是我们共同记忆的一部分。
reason: Advocacy for preservation of Chinese new village heritage. Cultural historical awareness.

input_text: 马来西亚的清真认证系统是全世界最严格的之一。JAKIM的认证受到国际认可。这对穆斯林游客来说非常方便，也促进了我们的食品出口。
reason: Informational discussion about JAKIM halal certification system. Factual, non-confrontational.

input_text: 我在马来西亚长大，最喜欢的回忆就是各种节日。每个种族的节日我们都会参与，吃不同的美食，穿不同的传统服装。这就是马来西亚的魅力。
reason: Fond childhood memories of participating in all racial festivals in Malaysia. Multicultural pride.

input_text: 传统华人婚礼的茶道仪式很有意义。新人向长辈敬茶，表达对家庭的尊重和感恩。虽然现在很多人选择西式婚礼，但这个传统值得保留。
reason: Chinese tea ceremony wedding tradition appreciation. Cultural heritage preservation sentiment.

input_text: 我们公司每年都会举办各种族节日的庆祝活动。Hari Raya有ketupat，农历新年有yee sang，Deepavali有murukku。同事们都很享受这种多元文化的氛围。
reason: Workplace celebrating festivals of all races. Inclusive corporate culture in Malaysia.

input_text: தீபாவளி வாழ்த்துக்கள்! இன்று காலையில் எண்ணெய் குளியல், புது ஆடை, கோலம் போட்டு, இனிப்புகள் செய்து கொண்டாடினோம். குடும்பத்துடன் இருப்பது மிகவும் மகிழ்ச்சி.
reason: Personal Deepavali celebration sharing including traditional rituals. Positive religious and cultural expression.

input_text: தைப்பூசம் அன்று பத்து மலையில் காவடி எடுத்து செல்வது மிகவும் ஆன்மீக அனுபவம். பக்தர்களின் நம்பிக்கையும் அர்ப்பணிப்பும் மிகவும் ஊக்கமளிக்கிறது.
reason: Respectful description of Thaipusam kavadi devotion at Batu Caves. Spiritual appreciation.

input_text: எங்கள் கிராமத்தில் பொங்கல் திருநாளை மிகவும் சிறப்பாக கொண்டாடுவோம். பொங்கல் பொங்கும்போது அனைவரும் மகிழ்ச்சியாக கூவுவார்கள். நன்றி உணர்வுடன் கொண்டாடும் பண்டிகை.
reason: Ponggal harvest festival celebration in village. Joyful cultural tradition sharing.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் கிறிஸ்துமஸ் கொண்டாட்டம் மிகவும் அழகாக இருக்கும். சபா, சரவாக் மாநிலங்களில் மிகவும் சிறப்பாக கொண்டாடுவார்கள். எல்லா இனத்தவரும் சேர்ந்து மகிழ்வார்கள்.
reason: Appreciation of Christmas celebrations in Sabah and Sarawak. Inclusive festive observation.

input_text: எங்கள் பள்ளியில் எல்லா இன மாணவர்களும் ஒன்றாக ஹரி ராயா, தீபாவளி, சீன புத்தாண்டு கொண்டாடுவோம். ஒற்றுமையின் அழகு இதுதான்.
reason: School celebrating all major festivals together with students of all races. Unity in diversity.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் பல்வேறு கலாச்சாரங்களை நான் மிகவும் நேசிக்கிறேன். ஒவ்வொரு இனத்தின் உணவு, ஆடை, இசை எல்லாமே தனித்துவமானவை. இந்த பன்முகத்தன்மை நமது பலம்.
reason: Love for Malaysia's cultural diversity including food, clothing, and music. Multicultural pride.

input_text: கோலாலம்பூரில் உள்ள தேவாலயங்கள், மசூதிகள், கோயில்கள் மற்றும் புத்த விகாரைகள் அனைத்தும் அருகருகே அமைந்துள்ளன. இது மலேசியாவின் சமய நல்லிணக்கத்தின் அடையாளம்.
reason: Observation of churches, mosques, temples, and viharas coexisting in KL. Religious harmony symbol.

input_text: நான் என் மலாய் நண்பனுக்கு தமிழ் கற்றுக்கொடுக்கிறேன், அவன் எனக்கு மலாய் கற்றுக்கொடுக்கிறான். மொழி கற்பது ஒருவரையொருவர் புரிந்துகொள்ள உதவுகிறது.
reason: Language exchange between Tamil and Malay friends. Cross-cultural learning and understanding.

input_text: தமிழ் திரைப்படங்கள் மலேசியாவில் மிகவும் பிரபலம். நம் தமிழர்கள் எடுக்கும் உள்ளூர் தமிழ் படங்களும் சிறப்பாக உள்ளன. நம் கலாச்சாரத்தை திரையில் காண்பது பெருமை.
reason: Pride in Malaysian Tamil cinema. Local cultural arts industry appreciation.

input_text: என் அம்மா ஒவ்வொரு தீபாவளிக்கும் வீட்டில் விளக்கேற்றுவாள். அந்த ஒளி இருளை விரட்டுவது போல, நல்லது தீமையை வெல்லும் என்ற நம்பிக்கையை குறிக்கிறது.
reason: Mother lighting lamps for Deepavali symbolizing good over evil. Personal spiritual tradition sharing.

input_text: CNY reunion dinner tahun ni kat rumah ah ma. She cooked 12 dishes leh! Got steamboat, roast duck, yee sang semua ada. The whole family tossed yee sang together, so fun!
reason: Mixed language CNY reunion dinner story. Warm family gathering with traditional food customs.

input_text: Weh korang, aku pergi Thaipusam kat Batu Caves semalam. First time tengok live. Memang respect la kat devotees yang carry kavadi tu. Such strong faith and devotion.
reason: Mixed language post showing respect for Thaipusam devotees. Positive interfaith appreciation.

input_text: Abang grab driver cerita dia puasa sambil kerja 12 jam. Salute la. Dia kata rezeki Allah tetap ada, kena usaha je. Respect gila semangat macam tu.
reason: Admiration for a grab driver fasting while working long hours. Positive Ramadan spirit story.

input_text: Wah semalam pergi open house Deepavali kawan, the murukku and laddu damn nice la! Aunty dia masak chicken curry pun sedap gila. Love Malaysian festivals, always got good food.
reason: Mixed language Deepavali open house food appreciation. Cross-cultural festival enjoyment.

input_text: Eh bro, tau tak kat Melaka ada gereja yang dah 500 tahun? St. Paul's Church tu. Portuguese tinggalkan. Now jadi heritage site. Malaysia memang rich with history from all cultures.
reason: Mixed language appreciation of Portuguese church heritage in Melaka. Multicultural historical awareness.

input_text: Cuti-cuti Malaysia kat Sarawak, dapat experience Gawai Dayak. Orang Iban sangat friendly dan welcoming. Rumah panjang dia cantik, makanan traditional pun sedap. Must visit la kalau boleh!
reason: Mixed language travel story experiencing Gawai Dayak in Sarawak. Positive cultural tourism.

input_text: Aku rasa proud gila bila foreigner puji Malaysia sebab diversity kita. They always amazed macam mana kita boleh hidup harmoni dengan so many different races and religions. Alhamdulillah.
reason: Pride in Malaysia's diversity recognized by foreigners. National multicultural harmony pride.

input_text: Time Raya aritu, jiran Cina aku hantar hamper. Time CNY pulak aku bagi mandarin oranges kat dia. Dah 20 tahun macam ni. This is what being Malaysian is all about.
reason: Long-standing gift exchange between Malay and Chinese neighbors during festivals. Interfaith friendship.

input_text: Last weekend gi food festival kat Shah Alam. Ada section halal, ada section Chinese food, ada section Indian food. All under one roof. Only in Malaysia you can find this kind of variety la.
reason: Mixed language food festival experience with diverse cuisines. Multicultural food appreciation.

input_text: Bro recommend la filem Malaysia best. Aku baru tengok 'Prebet Sapu' — damn good storytelling la. Malaysian cinema dah semakin mature. Proud of our local filmmakers, seriously.
reason: Malaysian film appreciation and recommendation. Local arts industry pride.

input_text: Aku rasa Ramadan buffet kat hotel sekarang dah over-commercialized sikit la. Tapi takpe, yang penting niat kita puasa tetap ikhlas. Jangan lupa sedekah kat yang memerlukan jugak.
reason: Mild critique of Ramadan buffet commercialization with positive reminder about sincerity and charity. Constructive religious reflection.

input_text: Auntie kat pasar tu teach me how to pick good kurma for Ramadan. She said look for the soft ones, not too dry. So sweet of her to share her knowledge with a young buyer like me.
reason: Warm intergenerational market interaction about selecting dates for Ramadan. Community bonding.

input_text: Mamak session lepas tarawikh is the best la wei. Roti canai, teh tarik, sembang dengan kawan sampai midnight. Ramadan vibes memang different, everyone so chill and grateful.
reason: Mixed language post-tarawikh mamak gathering. Positive Ramadan social bonding.

input_text: Angklung kat sekolah anak aku best gila. Budak Melayu, Cina, India semua main together. The teacher said music is the universal language. So true la, tengok je muka budak-budak tu happy sangat.
reason: Mixed language story of multiracial children playing angklung together at school. Music as unifying force.

input_text: Tadi pergi Batu Caves area, nampak kuil Hindu beside masjid beside tokong Cina. Only in Malaysia you can see this la. We should be proud of our religious harmony, seriously treasure it.
reason: Mixed language observation of religious buildings coexisting near Batu Caves. Religious harmony appreciation.
